name: In a search of a new home
short_description: Are you ready to enjoy the adventure of the fox and help him find a home? A lot of different locations, obstacles, enemies, nice music and other bonuses are waiting for you in this platform game!
detailed_description:
Are you ready to enjoy the adventure of the fox and help him find a home? The fox has lost his old home and he will have to go through many things with your help to test himself and to find a new place! "In a search of a new home" is a very dynamic casual game, with beautiful graphics in colourfull style.

Key features:
  • Great music (8bit mario-style and others);
  • Many different locations;
  • obstacles;
  • strong enemies;
  • minimalistic level design;
  • achievments;
  • checkpoints (game saves) on every level;
Jump, fight and run to be first in this game!
